interactionPlan.concept: The focus of expansion in forward camera motion demonstrates how objects appear to move and expand in an image frame as the camera approaches a surface.

interactions.label: Start/Stop Forward Motion
interactions.teaches: Illustrates the expansion of the wall and the focus of expansion; demonstrates how peripheral points appear to move faster than central points.

interactions.label: Adjust Camera Speed
interactions.teaches: Shows how changing the speed of the camera affects the rate of apparent motion in the image plane.

interactions.label: Move Focus of Expansion
interactions.teaches: Interactive change of focus demonstrates how different central points affect perceived motion directions.

interactions.label: Show/Hide Motion Vectors
interactions.teaches: Provides a visual representation of the direction and magnitude of apparent motion vectors at various points in the field.

interactionPlan.camera_suggestion: Initial viewpoint should be a frontal view towards the center of the wall, with the camera slightly elevated to provide perspective.
interactionPlan.notes: Ensure clarity by using distinct colors for motion vectors and animate the expansion gradually to emphasize motion field changes.

gpt-4o.notes: The 3D scene deviates significantly with incorrect geometry, missing labels, and additional elements not in the original.
